subcodes.first_line: The Beloved beareth witness that there is none other God but Me, the All-Dominating, the Self-Subsisting, and He testifieth unto him who hath attained unto steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المحبوب انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم و شهد لمن فاز بالاستقامه انه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @chastisement and requital
